scripts.dev:be: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev:livekit: cd backend/livekit_agent && uv run python entrypoint.py
scripts.dev:pageindex: cd page-index && bash -c 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; .venv/bin/alembic upgrade head && { .venv/bin/celery -A api.tasks.celery_app worker --loglevel=info & .venv/bin/uvicorn api.main:app --port 8001 --reload; }'
scripts.pipeline:tips: cd backend && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && uv run python scripts/build_catalog.py && uv run python scripts/fetch_transcripts.py && uv run python scripts/enrich_videos.py
